check_interval_sec.description: Defines the interval, in seconds, between health check probes. Must be a positive number.

description.description: Provides additional information or context about the resource. Can be any string value.

grpc_health_check.description: Configures GRPC health checks, including optional parameters like service name, port, and port specifications. Use to monitor GRPC-based services.

healthy_threshold.description: Specifies the number of consecutive successful health checks required before marking a resource as healthy. Must be a positive integer.

http2_health_check.description: Defines settings for HTTP/2 health checks, including optional host, port, and request path configurations. Use to test HTTP/2 endpoints.
http2_health_check.type: list(object({host: optional(string),port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request_path: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

http_health_check.description: Configures HTTP health checks, allowing optional parameters like host, port, and request path. Use for monitoring HTTP endpoints.
http_health_check.type: list(object({host: optional(string),port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request_path: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

https_health_check.description: Defines HTTPS health check settings, including optional host, port, and request path configurations. Use to verify HTTPS endpoints.
https_health_check.type: list(object({host: optional(string),port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request_path: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

log_config.description: Configures logging settings for the resource, including whether logging is enabled. Accepts a boolean value.

name.description: Specifies the resource's name. Required and must be unique within the scope of the resource.

source_regions.description: Lists the regions from which traffic originates. Useful for geographically scoped configurations.

ssl_health_check.description: Defines SSL health check settings, including optional port, request, and response configurations. Use to monitor SSL-enabled endpoints.
ssl_health_check.type: list(object({port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

tcp_health_check.description: Configures TCP health check settings, including optional port and request parameters. Use for monitoring TCP-based services.
tcp_health_check.type: list(object({port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

timeout_sec.description: Specifies the time, in seconds, to wait before marking a health check as failed. Must be a positive number.

timeouts.description: Defines timeout settings for resource operations, including creation, deletion, and updates. Values are expected in string format (e.g., '30m').

unhealthy_threshold.description: Specifies the number of consecutive failed health checks required before marking a resource as unhealthy. Must be a positive integer.
